buildCmd: pnpm --filter client run build && (cd src/client && npx tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist)

libOverrides.story-imports.mjs: add 'sb' to INERT_STUB named exports — preview.ts calls sb.mock() from storybook/test at module scope
libOverrides.source-storybook.mjs: import story-imports from sibling override so decorator bundler gets the sb-aware INERT_STUB
libOverrides.css-fallback.mjs: extend scrapeRemoteImports to read locally-linked CSS files for @import url(https://...) — Vite bundles Google Fonts into assets/iframe-*.css, not as <link> tags
